page_content:
REQUIREMENTS Elements of the General Education

Program

The General Education program is comprised of courses that build foundational skills (Fundamental Studies (p. 1)), courses that expand the breadth of your education (Distributive Studies (p. 2)) and courses that explore and study human, societal and cultural differences (Diversity (p. 2)). At least two of your Distributive Studies courses will delve in to a "Big Question" as seen through the lens of a particular academic discipline (Big Question (p. 2)).
